recommendations.title: Vincent N Roxxy
recommendations.overview: A small town loner and a rebellious punk rocker unexpectedly fall in love as they are forced on the run and soon discover violence follows them everywhere.

recommendations.title: Two Thousand Maniacs!
recommendations.overview: Six people are lured into a small Deep South town for a Centennial celebration where the residents kill them one by one as revenge for the town's destruction during the Civil War.

recommendations.title: Antlers
recommendations.overview: A small-town Oregon teacher and her brother, the local sheriff, discover a young student is harbouring a dangerous secret that could have frightening consequences.

recommendations.title: As Cool as I Am
recommendations.overview: A smart teenage girl comes of age in a small town with her self-centered parents who had her when they were teenagers.

recommendations.title: North Sea Texas
recommendations.overview: A teen boy living in a small town on the Belgian coast finds his ordinary life take an unexpected turn when a handsome traveler blows through town.

recommendations.title: The Silent Revolution
recommendations.overview: In 1956 Stalinstadt, East Germany, during the Hungarian uprising against Soviets is taking place, local teenagers perform a seemingly harmless act that causes unexpected consequences.

recommendations.title: Who Would You Take to a Deserted Island?
recommendations.overview: On their last night together, four longtime flatmates' lives are suddenly upended when a secret is revealed during the course of an evening celebration.

recommendations.title: Dead Man's Shoes
recommendations.overview: A soldier returns to his small town and exacts a deadly revenge on the thugs who tormented his disabled brother while he was away.

recommendations.title: Fear Street: 1666
recommendations.overview: In 1666, a colonial town is gripped by a hysterical witch-hunt that has deadly consequences for centuries to come, and it's up to teenagers in 1994 to finally put an end to their town's curse, before it's too late.

recommendations.title: The 100 Year-Old Man Who Climbed Out the Window and Disappeared
recommendations.overview: After living a long and colorful life, Allan Karlsson finds himself stuck in a nursing home. On his 100th birthday, he leaps out a window and begins an unexpected journey.
